methodologies.name: Design Thinking
methodologies.description: Human-centered iterative methodology. Start with empathy, define the real problem, ideate broadly, prototype rapidly, test with real users.

methodologies.name: Double Diamond
methodologies.description: Two phases of divergent/convergent thinking. First diamond: find the right problem. Second diamond: find the right solution.

methodologies.name: Lean UX
methodologies.description: Outcomes over deliverables. Hypotheses over requirements. Experiments over specs. Get to validated learning as fast as possible.

methodologies.name: Atomic Design
methodologies.description: Build interfaces from the smallest units up. Atoms combine into molecules, molecules into organisms, organisms into templates, templates into pages.

methodologies.name: Material Design
methodologies.description: Design system based on physical metaphors (material surfaces, light, shadow). Rational grid, elevation system, motion principles, adaptive layout.

methodologies.name: Human Interface Guidelines
methodologies.description: Platform-native design philosophy. Respect platform conventions, leverage system capabilities, prioritize clarity, deference, and depth.

methodologies.name: Fluent Design System
methodologies.description: Sensory design system built on light, depth, motion, material, and scale. Designed for a world of holographic, mixed-reality interfaces.

methodologies.name: Lightning Design System
methodologies.description: Enterprise design system optimized for data-dense applications. Blueprint patterns for complex workflows, data tables, and record pages.

methodologies.name: Carbon Design System
methodologies.description: Open-source design system for products and digital experiences. Strong data visualization patterns. AI and machine learning UI patterns.

methodologies.name: Spectrum Design System
methodologies.description: Design system for creative professionals. Optimized for precision tools, canvas-based interfaces, and professional workflows.

methodologies.name: Polaris Design System
methodologies.description: Design system for commerce. Optimized for merchant workflows, product management, order processing, and analytics dashboards.

methodologies.name: Ant Design
methodologies.description: Enterprise-grade React component library with exhaustive component set. Strong form patterns, table patterns, and data entry workflows.

methodologies.name: Jobs to Be Done
methodologies.description: People don't buy products, they hire them to do a job. Understanding the job reveals the real competition and the real opportunity.

methodologies.name: Inclusive Design
methodologies.description: Design for human diversity. Recognize exclusion, learn from diversity, solve for one extend to many. Permanent, temporary, and situational disabilities.

methodologies.name: Gestalt Principles of Perception
methodologies.description: The brain organizes visual information into groups. Proximity, similarity, continuity, closure, figure-ground, common fate, and symmetry.

methodologies.name: Design Sprint
methodologies.description: Compressed design process. Map the problem on Monday, sketch solutions Tuesday, decide Wednesday, prototype Thursday, test with users Friday.

methodologies.name: Responsive Web Design
methodologies.description: Fluid grids, flexible images, and media queries. One codebase, every viewport. Mobile-first or desktop-first breakpoint strategy.

methodologies.name: Design Tokens
methodologies.origin: Salesforce / W3C Design Tokens Community Group
methodologies.description: Platform-agnostic design decisions as data. Colors, spacing, typography, shadows, motion — all expressed as tokens that compile to any platform.
